programme.title: Military Makeover: Hixon Family Makeover
programme.desc: The family has been moved out and the demolition stage is underway.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster

programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bringing Up Baby

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Biddy Battle

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Emotionally In-Vested

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Restaurant Impossible
programme.desc: Chase decides to start his own candle business and Julie finds that her dream of opening up her own restaurant clashes with Todd's vision.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Spoiled Sports

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Perfect Equation
programme.desc: When Savannah brings home her new boyfriend Todd takes the opportunity to test his intentions. Chase and Savannah step up and help when Grayson struggles with a math test.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord of the Earrings
programme.desc: Todd tries to teach Julie a lesson about keeping track of her jewelry after she loses another expensive piece. Nanny Faye enlists Chase's help for a neighborhood porch competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Diplomatic Immunity
programme.desc: Due to a work commitment, Julie must miss Chloe's Pre-K graduation while Todd takes over her duties. Savannah tries to prove to Todd she's ready for a new job in California.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Towing the Line
programme.desc: Chase takes advantage of his dad's car when Savannah signs them up to babysit over Father's Day. Meanwhile, Grayson has trouble getting along with Savannah's boyfriend, Nic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pool's Out for Summer
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to get Chase to move to Nashville, Todd offers him their house that he's already promised to Savannah. Meanwhile the ladies can't get enough of Alison's new hot pool instructor.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Big 50
programme.desc: Todd ponders the first half of his life as his 50th birthday approaches. Meanwhile, Grayson clamors to be left home alone now that he's 12 years old.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Just Dance, or at Least Try
programme.desc: Comedians Yamaneika Saunders and Jeremiah Watkins face off against Carly Jibson and Kel Mitchell in a $10,000 comedy dance battle for charity. Things get down and dirty at Prom and two talented plumbers struggle to freek-a-leek.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take Japan
programme.desc: Kim scrambles to shoot an entire Yeezy season seven campaign while in Japan, but worries that her sisters' questionable fashion sense might jeopardize the debut of the line.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let's Play Ball!
programme.desc: The Kardashians take on the Jacksons in a charity softball game. Meanwhile, Kris pools her resources to renovate the Watts Empowerment Center, and Khloé and Scott devise a clever plan to reveal Art Vandelay's true identity.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady
programme.desc: Inspired by the March for Our Lives demonstration, Kim meets with the survivors of the Parkland shooting to learn about their movement. Meanwhile, Scott revives his podcast with Khloé in Cleveland, and Kylie feels insecure about her post-baby body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Khloé and Tristan head back to LA with baby True. Unresolved tension lingers between Kim and Tristan due to his infidelity. Kourtney travels to DC to talk with Congress. Kim heads to Vegas with her girlfriends prove she's still a wild girl.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck
programme.desc: Kim returns to Paris for the first time since the robbery. Meanwhile Kourtney fears she waited too long to freeze her eggs, and Kendall worries she'll humiliate herself in a charity poker tournament.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Break Free
programme.desc: Kim devotes her time and energy to helping free Alice Johnson from prison. Khloé stresses about spending her first night away from baby True, and Kanye finds himself in hot water over some controversial comments.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Impossible: Part Three
programme.desc: Three more chefs are vying for a chance to compete against Robert Irvine in Triple G Impossible Tournament, round three! First, the chefs make a stacked breakfast using wild items determined by a deck of cards.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Impossible: Finale
programme.desc: The winners of the first three rounds of the Triple G Impossible Tournament compete to take on Robert Irvine once more in the finale. First, the chefs must use the 'impossible' items on Guy Fieri's grocery list to make a decadent sandwich.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Single-aisle Showdowns
programme.desc: Four chefs find that even the biggest aisle can still be limiting if it's the only one they can shop. The chefs are challenged to make a hot lunch, comfort food and a dinner spread.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Rematch Mania
programme.desc: Three pairs of rival chefs who previously faced off one-on-one return. First, two budget brawlers settle the score in a round that has them shopping for ingredients under five dollars for their family dinners.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: April Fools' Day
programme.desc: No one loved a good laugh more than GGG judge Carl 'The Cuban' Ruiz. In honor of Carl's love for hijinks, Guy Fieri has invited six of his closest Flavortown judges to join him for April Fools' Day pranks as they remember The Cuban's funniest GGG moments.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Down to the Top Four
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri continues the tournament, with the battles growing fiercer. One promising chef learns the hard way that there's no margin for error.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: World Fusion

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Eggtastic
programme.desc: The remaining recruits enter boot camp to find it has been transformed into a casino complete with a game of Egg Roulette. The chefs will teach their recruits a pancake recipe and ask them to recreate it.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Cowboy Cuisine

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Casey's cross-country culinary trek brings him to Providence, Rhode Island. He starts with a decadent brioche doughnut that's topped with brunch all-stars and then heads for the sea to dig oysters for a fresh feast.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson, Arizona
programme.desc: Casey Webb's eating expedition brings him to Tucson, Arizona, where he faces off with a cheese and chile tamale pie piled high with pulled pork, avocado hollandaise and more. Then he takes on a bacon-wrapped hot dog taco with all the fixings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run
programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Legends of the Galapagos
programme.desc: The Irwins and Harriet, a 168-year-old tortoise taken from the Galapagos Islands by Charles Darwin, go on an adventure to see what her homeland and living relatives are like.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: America's Deadliest Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and Terri travel across the U.S. in search of remarkable rattlesnake species. Steve has a close call with Timber Rattlers in Virginia. In Florida, they find snakes as diverse as the Pigmy Rattler and the large Eastern Diamondback.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Deep: Sea Snakes
programme.desc: Sea snakes are some of the most venomous snakes in the world. Steve dives into their underwater habitat to show how placid and tolerant these reptiles can be when unprovoked.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Deep: Saurians
programme.desc: The Irwins travel to the waters off Jamaica, Vanuatu and Queensland, Australia, to swim mere inches from the massive jaws of the reptiles that inhabit these deep ocean waters. Steve and Terri search the Galapagos Islands for marine iguanas.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Steve and the Dragon
programme.desc: Steve Irwin comes face-to-face with the largest living lizard in the world, the Komodo dragon, on the remote islands of Indonesia. These huge powerful reptiles seem lazy and docile, most of the time.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Dangerous Africans
programme.desc: Steve travels through Africa on foot to study some of the most notoriously dangerous African animals. He is charged by huge elephants, rolls up to a massive herd of buffalo, intimidates a pride of lions and is chased by large hippos.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Casper: The White Crocodile
programme.desc: Steve and his team relocate 11 of the feistiest crocodiles to their new pond at the zoo.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Croc Live
programme.desc: No cuts, no edits, no dress rehearsal. Join the Crocodile Hunter live from Australia.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Search for a Super Croc

programme.desc: A couple loves the location of their house and wants to keep their families' tradition of forever homes, but they're tired of the cramped kitchen and awkward layout. Drew and Jonathan overhaul the spaces to create a home that works for their busy lives.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Perfect Pair Ready for a Perfect Pad
programme.desc: Newlyweds Michelle and Jon are determined to move out of his parents' basement and into a forever home of their own. Their ample budget and their real estate dreams are out of step with the market.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Charming Fixer-upper With Unexpected Issues
programme.desc: A chemical engineer with a jet-set lifestyle, Karima has worked and lived all over the world. After six years as a nomad, it's time to reconnect with family and friends, so now she's looking for a deluxe urban home of her own.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A young family of five looks to put down roots in Florida by building their forever home on a 2-acre lot. Brian and Mika mix modern touches with rustic, farmhouse charm to create a dream home the family can enjoy for years to come.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Home Before Baby
programme.desc: Brian and Mika feel the pressure as they build a custom dream home for an expecting couple whose baby arrives in just over 100 days.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Jungle to Dream Oasis
programme.desc: Brian and Mika are challenged to turn an overgrown lot into a dream home for an expecting family. The homeowner is also a chef who has stipulations about his kitchen, meaning Brian and Mika have their work cut out for them to create the perfect property.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Little Piece of Quiet in Indiana
programme.desc: Craig was couch surfing and living paycheck to paycheck when he was given the second chance of a lifetime a million-dollar prize for winning a Hoosier Lottery second-chance drawing. He can now buy the land he's wanted in rural Indiana.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Dreaming Big in Boston
programme.desc: A young Massachusetts couple with six kids was beginning to feel cramped in their water damaged two-bedroom house. After winning a million dollars on a quick pick, however, they're finally able to buy a home big enough for their huge family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Beginner's Luck
programme.desc: A lottery skeptic won $1 million on the first scratch ticket she ever bought. Now, with the help of property ace David Bromstad, she and her husband set out to buy the perfect retirement palace in sunny Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: California Chick House
programme.desc: A young-at-heart grandmother wants to buy the perfect "chick house" after a $785,000 PowerBall win. David Bromstad helps her find an adorable home big enough to entertain her huge family but small enough to maintain by herself.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Me to Tennessee
programme.desc: A couple wins a million dollars, but instead of buying their own dream home, they want to buy one for their son that they can live in, too.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Little Sister, Big House
programme.desc: After winning $1 million, Ashley can move out of her rental in Cape Girardeau, Missouri, and buy her first home with her share of the winnings. David Bromstad helps her choose between a renovator's dream and a brand-new build.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Hero's Reward
programme.desc: After lady luck rewards a retired firefighter for a lifetime of service with a big win, dream home hunter David Bromstad helps him search for the perfect bachelor pad in the Lakeland region of Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Four-million-dollar Smile
programme.desc: Jesus bought a $20 scratcher that netted him a $4 million win. Now, this car-crazy millionaire needs a new pad to house all his flashy new rides in Kankakee, Illinois.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Family of Nine No Longer Fits in Their Home
programme.desc: Vince and Jennifer bought their home when it perfectly fit their family of five. Since moving in their family has grown to nine, but their house cannot grow with them.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Retired Couple Debates the Functional Issues in Their Dated Home
programme.desc: Kathy struggles with the functional issues in the kitchen, living room and master bathroom, and while John has gone so far as to demo the bathroom to make her happy, they haven't been able to agree on a new floor plan.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Need for Efficiency
programme.desc: A couple loves the character of their 1960s home, but he wants something more energy efficient with space to expand their family.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Urban vs. Suburban Living
programme.desc: A couple are ready to get what they want in a house now that their children have grown up and moved out. He wants space for entertaining and she's convinced their future is a new place downtown.

programme.title: Movie: The Killer Next Door
programme.desc: After a woman's husband dies in a car crash, she moves across the country to build a relationship with her late husband's sister. Little does she know her sister-in-law is out to get her.

programme.title: Movie: My Mother's Killer Boyfriend
programme.desc: A young mother finally falls in love again with a handsome and charismatic professor. However as the romance continues she begins to worry whether he really is who he says he is.

programme.title: Movie: The Killer Downstairs
programme.desc: An unsuspecting woman rents a room to a man who quickly becomes obsessed with her and threatens the people around her.

programme.title: Movie: Stranger in the House
programme.desc: Upon returning from her honeymoon, a woman discovers that the caregiver she hired to look after her father has seduced him into marriage. He suddenly dies following a fall, and she suspects foul play.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits: John Gacy Prison

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Oooof There It Is!
programme.desc: After witnessing the guests having an out-of-control party, Captain Glenn stands his ground and sets limits on this testosterone-filled charter. Madison and Georgia are on different pages as they try to find their own ways to navigate Jenna's demands.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: No Bra, No Shoes, Bad Service
programme.desc: Adam and Jenna can't see eye-to-eye on where their relationship stands, and their epic fight on the fly bridges is a buzzkill for the rest of the crew. Ciara tries to manage Parker, but he resents her bossiness, leading the two to come to blows.

programme.title: Below Deck: More Foam, Bosun!
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Eddie, and Amy are joined by five new crewmembers as they prepare the luxury yacht, Eros, for a new charter season in Abaco, Bahamas. The crew welcomes their first guests, a hard-partying hotel owner and his friends.

programme.title: Below Deck: Off the Radar
programme.desc: After Rocky and Emile are disciplined for their dangerous stunt, Kate is hell-bent on making sure Rocky atones for her mistake. Meanwhile, Connie gets some terrible news that leaves her future on the boat in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Pretty Cheeks
programme.desc: Kate's charter guest soul mate from last season returns. Rocky tries to keep going with her mundane tasks while Don tries to make amends with Eddie. Kate questions Chef Leon's credentials and Don puts his future on the yacht in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: I Don't Date, I Mate
programme.desc: In spite of being a man down with Don's departure, Eddie and the rest of the deckhands feel relieved and stronger than ever. When guest Dean suggests a crew dive contest, the Eros team willing obliges and Rocky breaks out her beloved mermaid tail.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Ironing the Captain's Shorts
programme.desc: After their less-than-stellar date, Rocky relegates Emile to the friend zone, and he's not having any of it. Meanwhile, Kate fails to provision a special bottle of tequila for the new guests, and it could spell disaster for her tip if she can't find it.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room
programme.desc: The 'Eros' crew enjoys a day off with an island hideaway, but Dane's drunken behaviour leads to a confrontation with Eddie that puts Dane's future on the boat in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the charter guests challenge Leon on his meal choices.

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Attila's Sword of Mars
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging fantasy blades from a meteorite. The smiths battle difficult forge welds using the canister method to create their blades. The final two must recreate a legendary weapon, Attila the Hun's Sword of Mars.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Rock-Throwing Crossbow
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths honour the forge's legendary power hammer Big Blu by ripping it apart and forging competition choppers. After two exhaustive rounds, two remaining smiths head home to recreate one of history's most unique hunting weapons.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Pira
programme.desc: After confronting an ocean of problems in the first two rounds, just two smiths sail through testing to make it to the final challenge where they must recreate the symbolic and deadly Filipino sword: the Pira.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Cutting Deeper: The German Dussage
programme.desc: Four blade smiths are tasked with making a canister damascus blade from threaded bolts. After a couple of intense rounds and some brutal testing, two smiths return to their home forges to recreate the deadly German Dussage Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: First Responders Edition
programme.desc: Four first responder bladesmiths are called to the forge to create tactical knives out of rescue tools. Two smiths will head home to forge a Halligan Bar, one of the most important tools of a firefighter.

programme.title: Eating History: Brush With History

programme.title: Eating History: Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: Josh and Smokey try to champion the oldest cereal ever eaten. Then, they examine a Vietnam-era ration, but aren't sure the 40-year old meat inside can possibly be preserved. Later they try a 40-year-old hot sauce to find out if it gets hotter with age.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Crime 360: Payback
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of a man found riddled with bullet holes after his van crashed in front of a house in a quiet neighbourhood.

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Field
programme.desc: On the morning of July 5th, the body of a victim is found in an abandoned lot that had been used to shoot off guns the night before in celebration in Independence Day. More than 60 shell casings are collected from the crime scene.

programme.title: See No Evil: Shadow of Hope
programme.desc: On December 26th 2011, Hope Melton vanishes after being run off a country road. CCTV footage from a nearby gas station reveals a suspicious orange car that seems to have followed her out of the parking lot.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.desc: A family feud escalates to brutal violence and John joins police in pursuit of Top Ten FBI fugitive Eugene Palmer; Callahan immerses himself in one of the most brutal cases he's ever seen as he helps authorities track down Tamera Williams.

programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Hitchike to Hell
programme.desc: Colorado police in hot pursuit of a serial killer are horrified when the pre-recorded message of a pager found in the snow near a victim's abandoned vehicle reveals an unthinkable predator: one sworn to protect and serve.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blizzard of Bullets
programme.desc: During chilling winter nights in Idaho, a madman is on the prowl... attacking citizens in a crime spree that stuns families and terrifies whole communities. Investigators must race against time to catch a killer... who kills for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter's Nightmare
programme.desc: An entire family vanishes in the dead of winter from Nebraska. Have they suddenly decided to skip town, or has something far worse happened? A daughter's relentless search helps cops uncover a sinister and deadly plot fueled by revenge and greed.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A woman's body is found burned to death in a burning car. As the smoke settles, police arrive and find an abandoned car seat in the back seat. Investigators are frantic to find the child and fear a vicious killer lurks in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: A brutal murder and frozen crime scene shatter an idyllic Idaho town. A suspect's bizarre confession has police hoping for a quick resolution, but all is not what it seems. They must find an attacker with a gruesome MO before he strikes again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Devil's Den
programme.desc: Baffled by the animal instincts of a cross country killer whose crimes seem to go dormant in winter, authorities ultimately follow his tracks to a den of deceit in the frozen tundra of Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: A Winter's Grave
programme.desc: During an icy Wisconsin winter, a single mom vanishes. Police learn she was recently stalked by two men at a bar, but the danger doesn't stop there. A brutal assault, an anonymous email and a bizarre confession shed light on a deadly encounter.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bill Doolin and The Oklahombres

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mark Finds His Dream Home Barn
programme.desc: After years of searching, Mark Bowe has found the barn he wants to turn into his own home. The guys work carefully to take apart the enormous bank barn without breaking any of the beams. Mark visits a nearby barn that has been transformed for weddings.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Doubleheader
programme.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time. Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Foldable Cabin
programme.desc: Mark brings one of his biggest ideas to life, a foldable steel cabin. The crew takes the cabin on its maiden voyage and unfolds it for the first time in the boneyard, then they add a timber frame facade and a complete barnwood interior to finish it off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: The Battle of the Green Chaise
programme.desc: Each team given 500-dollar budget to find, fix up, and flip items purchased at New York's Stormville Airport Flea Market. In one hour.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Holy Cow Table!
programme.desc: Designers and friends Ingrid and Candace take on the husband-wife team of Ed and Lisa.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Flea Market Flip puts two teams to the test, challenging them to find diamonds in the rough to rescue, recycle, and re-invent into decorating gems and resold for a profit.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Turn Up the Radio!
programme.desc: Neighbours Frank and Patrick take on stylish husband wife team of Marc and Tiffany.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Young Hipsters vs. Old School Design
programme.desc: Hip newlyweds Rachel and Blair take on besties Jyl and Michael.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Love Letters or Hate Mail?
programme.desc: Best buddies Randy and Frank are passionate about reinventing found objects.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Funky Desert Tiny
programme.desc: A free spirit has found her desert paradise and is working to fulfill her dream of building a tiny home eco-village on 10 acres in Joshua Tree, CA. This unique, transforming tiny will have two halves connected by an atrium and has multiple beds.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Newlywed Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds start off their new life together minimally and cost-effectively by going tiny in Salmon, ID.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Desert Paradise
programme.desc: An architect takes his plans for a unique tiny house to the middle of the Arizona desert. The build will have legs so it won't disrupt the desert landscape as well as plenty of interesting angles and different uses of metals.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Puget Sound Paradise
programme.desc: An outdoor-loving couple is looking to get lost in the Pacific Northwest with a tiny paradise in Puget Sound, Washington. With help from family, they design their home complete with funky features perfect for exploring the landscape.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Tree Lovin' Yurts
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny are challenged with building a completely unique, tree-themed yurt. The Beschens decide on a large, 30-foot yurt and request other yurt firsts such as a private, walled-off master bedroom and the largest dormer they've ever built.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Yurt in Paradise
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny use a rare wood only found in Hawaii to build a yurt on a farm for clients determined to live completely of the grid.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Snack Attack
programme.desc: From pickles to tacos, nachos to nuts, we reveal the snackalicious snacks craved by Giada, Ted Allen, Alex Guarnaschelli, Curtis Stone and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Meat-Fest
programme.desc: Food Network stars including Duff, Michael Symon, Ted Allen and Cat Cora bring on the meat! Leg of beast, roast suckling pig, lamb shank, even a tri-tip sandwich, it's meat that can't be beat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swine Dining
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the Liberty Kitchen in Houston, Texas, where Chef Lance Fegen has built a monster wood-fired Argentinian grill. Roger and Lance prepare a traditional Balinese pig roast by spit-roasting it over bold mesquite coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Generations Of Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lyon
programme.desc: Andrew explores the legendary and timeless cuisine of Lyon, France.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pasta, Tacos and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts his search for great bites on wheels in Venice Beach, Calif., at the Prince of Venice, a food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Tacos, Drumsticks and Stuffed Waffles
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts off in Nashville, where chef Danny Bua is packing unique flavour combinations into soft tortilla tacos on That Awesome Taco Truck. Brad tries the '80s throwback taco with a cheese quesadilla base as well as a lobster roll taco.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Corn Dogs, Cheesesteaks and Ice Cream Sandwiches
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Seattle, where Rob Killiam of Bread and Circuses is dishing out comfort food with a playful twist.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireside Hangs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is hanging out with two chefs putting a whole new spin on rotisserie cooking in the great outdoors. At SpringHouse restaurant in Alexander City, Ala., Chef Rob McDaniel has designed a fire-fueled contraption that he and Roger use to roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Fixins
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Florida fanning the flames for something savory and something sweet. Roger heads to Hamaknockers Bar-B-Que in Crawfordville, where a young pitmaster pulls pork with a power tool!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in pig paradise, cooking up two whole hogs in two different styles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Where There's Smoke There's Fish
programme.desc: Find out how the relationship between fish and smoke is such a surprisingly perfect one.

programme.title: Good Eats: Mayo Clinic
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown as he debunks the many mysteries of mayonnaise.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: The Cross and the Crescent

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Rocket

programme.title: Nova: Ice Worlds

programme.title: The Greeks: Cavemen to Kings

programme.title: The Greeks: The Good Strife

programme.desc: The Banks family appears on 'The Oprah Winfrey Show' and their bickering causes an uproar.

programme.title: Movie: Sister of the Bride

programme.title: Movie: Flip That Romance
programme.desc: Rival house-flippers find themselves in a renovation face-off when they are both assigned two halves of a duplex to renovate. They attempt to out-renovate each other, every-step of the way, which leads to an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Movie: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: As she considers giving up on her artistic dreams, Jamie paints a vision board that brings her success and love - only to discover that the mystery man in her painting isn't who she thinks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: Frasier: And the Whimper Is...
programme.desc: Frasier and Roz attempt to improve their chance of winning a SeaBea by sending gifts to the jury members. Frasier soon regrets his actions when he learns that an eminent talk show host is retiring at the end of the year.

programme.title: Frasier: Give Him the Chair
programme.desc: After replacing Martin's favourite chair with a new one, Frasier is forced to appeal for the old chair's whereabouts on his show and finally locates it as a stage prop for a school play.

programme.title: Frasier: Fortysomething
programme.desc: Middle age begins to take its toll on Frasier, and he wonders if a relationship with an attractive younger sales assistant may be the answer.

programme.title: Frasier: Travels With Martin
programme.desc: The Cranes convince Daphne to accompany them when they take a trip in a Winnebago. All is well until Martin accidentally crosses the border into Canada, and Daphne fears she may not be allowed to re-enter the United States.

programme.title: Frasier: Author, Author
programme.desc: Petty jealousy reigns when Niles and Frasier lock themselves in a hotel room to write a book about sibling relationships.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Crane's Day Off
programme.desc: When Frasier comes down with the flu, he is reluctant to let Gil fill in for him for fear of losing his timeslot. Despite sending Niles to fill in for him, a delirious Frasier decides to rush down to the station to reclaim his show.

programme.title: Frasier: My Coffee With Niles
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles meet at Café Nervosa to discuss the one-year anniversary of Frasier's move to Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier: Slow Tango in South Seattle
programme.desc: An old friend writes a book about how Frasier lost his virginity with his piano teacher.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Hires An English Tutor
programme.desc: Lucy hires a tutor so her baby will be raised in the 'proper vocal environment.'

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Has Labor Pains
programme.desc: Secretly envious of all the attention Lucy is getting, Ricky develops psychosomatic pains.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Becomes a Sculptress
programme.desc: No child should grow up without an artistic influence, so Lucy takes up sculpting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Goes to the Hospital
programme.desc: Even with the trip to the hospital carefully rehearsed, Lucy's labor doesn't go quite as planned.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: The hosts welcome Andrea Brooks and Paul Greene from 'When Calls the Heart' and reality TV star and cancer survivor Ethan Zohn.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Movie: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Movie: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen

programme.title: The Office: The Return

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: March 26, 2020

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Outbreak
programme.desc: Patients surface with similar symptoms and doctors have to act fast if they hope to save lives.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Disease Detectives
programme.desc: The CDC Disease Detectives investigate several emergency room patients with strange infections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys head to Hawaii to bring life back to a homestead destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homesteads Revisited
programme.desc: The Raneys have traversed America saving homesteaders on the verge of failing. Now, the Raneys reflect on fan-favorite visits and watch self-shot updates from the most resilient of these homesteaders.

programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.desc: The Raneys have traversed America saving homesteaders on the verge of failing. Now, the Raneys reflect on fan-favorite visits and watch self-shot updates from the most resilient of these homesteaders.

programme.title: Secrets of Interrogation
programme.desc: A look inside the interrogation room to uncover the secrets police use to get their suspects to confess.

programme.title: Alaska Marshals
programme.desc: In Alaska, America's last frontier, some of the country's most hardened criminals are on the run. United States Marshals search for dangerous fugitives while battling the elements. Law enforcement here is like no other assignment in the U.S.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Six recession-hit patriots from Oregon become greenhorn old miners and head to Alaska to dig for gold in hopes of striking it big to save themselves from financial ruin.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Fever
programme.desc: After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule and out of money. They need to find $10,000 worth of gold within two days or the families will be sent home. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock or Bust
programme.desc: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Never Say Die
programme.desc: With the arctic winter looming, the crew races against the clock. Rain and thawing snow flood the mine and Jack puts his life on the line as the glory hole caves in around the massive 100,000 pound excavator.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard is lumpy, he has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Record Breaking Lump!
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90% of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Where Are They Now: Yami

programme.desc: As The Last Alaskans settle in to their fall routines in preparation for winter's trapping season, several visitors make their way out to the cabins. Heimo and Edna roll out the red carpet for their youngest daughter Krinn and new grandson, Colby.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Deep: Turtles
programme.desc: Journey into the world of endangered green and loggerhead turtles to study the life cycle.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Return to the Wild
programme.desc: Witness an attempt to rescue a rogue crocodile from a populated Australian waterway.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Time
programme.desc: Cameras capture the natural behaviour of dolphins at play. Also, gaze upon magnificent tropical fish near the Island of Time, just south of the Great Barrier Reef. Terri films the mating rituals of green water turtles.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Faces in the Forest
programme.desc: Steve falls in love with the orangutans of Sumatra and helps in the rehabilitation process while joining some of the wilder animals in the trees where they live.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Australia's Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Queensland's Cape York is considered one of the last wild frontiers in Australia. Steve and Terri set out on a journey along some of the most treacherous roads and remote rivers to reach the northernmost tip of the country.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Outlaws of the Outback
programme.desc: Travel with the Irwins to find the creatures that are running rampant in the Australian bush and are upsetting the ecological balance of the country. From foxes to feral cats to rabbits, Steve and Terri set out to locate and round them up.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Outback to Hollywood
programme.desc: Enter the lives of Steve and Terri Irwin to learn about their decade-long rise to fame.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: They Shoot Crocodiles Don't They
programme.desc: Steve turns the camera around to introduce the photographers who film his adventures.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Confessions of the Crocodile Hunter
programme.desc: The Croc Hunter reveals his most private and innermost thoughts through interviews.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Pawning Terri's Heart
programme.desc: Terri attends the exam of Charlie the Tiger to determine if his tumors were successfully treated. Bindi and the Small Mammal Team help develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian Devil. Robert discovers the true genders of the Zoo's shingleback lizards.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: The Bobby Brown Story

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Sleepless in Bel-Air
programme.desc: Will and Carlton try to concentrate on their schoolwork while surrounded by distractions.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Who's the Boss

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I Know Why the Caged Bird Screams
programme.desc: Will and Jazz steal a statue from a rival school, who in turn kidnaps Carlton.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: When You Hit Upon a Star
programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: The Parkers: Election 2000
programme.desc: Kim and Nikki become political rivals when both run for president of the student-body.

programme.title: The Parkers: Heir Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: For a creative-writing project, Kim imagines her family as the Ewings from 'Dallas.'

programme.title: The Parkers: Turkey Day Blues
programme.desc: The gang winds up in a homeless shelter on Thanksgiving Day after Nikki and Kim argue.

programme.title: The Parkers: Cheers
programme.desc: Kim's cheerleading squad auditions Nikki but rejects her, with dire consequences.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Prank King
programme.desc: Dre fears his holiday fun will be ruined when the older kids balk at the glorious Johnson Halloween tradition of seeing who can pull the most outlandish pranks on each other.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Oedipal Triangle
programme.desc: Dre's mother, Ruby, comes for a visit, and she smothers her pork chops with gravy, Dre with love, and would like to flat out smother Bow, who feels the same way about her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Santa/ White Christmas
programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

programme.desc: Two friends plan to rob an armoured car but a NYPD officer stands in their way.

programme.title: Movie: Blood Father

programme.title: Movie: After Earth

programme.title: Movie: Zombieland
programme.desc: Two men struggle to survive as they journey westward to L.A. They rely on each other, their code of rules and their cache of weapons to survive a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Three Brothers and a Bedroom
programme.desc: Rachel and Adam's family has outgrown their home, with three of their four children sharing one bedroom.

programme.title: Love It or List It: On Shaky Ground
programme.desc: A real estate broker on the lookout for the perfect family home spotted a diamond in the rough and convinced his wife to buy it. While he sees its unlimited potential, however, she can't see past the long list of fixes, including the cracked ceiling.

programme.title: Selling New York: One Family Prepares to Move Cross-Country While Another Looks to Expand Their Nest
programme.desc: Expanding families search for new homes and embrace change.

programme.title: Selling New York: Property Virgin
