programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buffalo Bull
programme.desc: President Ronald Reagan's high school yearbook comes into the shop, complete with a signed letter from 'The Gipper'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Guns and Rangers
programme.desc: The Pawn stars have a chance to buy a key from the 16th or 17th century, but it does not open doors, it shoots bullets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Poker Night
programme.desc: It's a high stakes proposition when a man saddles up to the shop with a 19th century professional gambling set.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pony Up
programme.desc: A collection from former Attorney General J. Howard McGrath enters the shop complete with his Secret Service I.D. and some counterfeit money. Rick and Chumlee encounter a 1960s U. S. Marines vehicle called a "Mighty Mite."

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Say It Ain't So
programme.desc: The guys check out a Savage Navy pistol, and Corey and Chum orbit a Moonman statue from the MTV Video Music Awards.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: A book signed by Charles Lindbergh flies into focus for the Pawn Stars, while a medal issued by Germany torpedoes into the shop. A guy tries to throw Rick off balance with a rare 17th-century money scale.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: World Series of Pawn
programme.desc: The guys look at a Los Angeles Dodgers World Series pennant signed by Frank Sinatra.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The guys check out a pair of punching bags owned by Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tee'd Off
programme.desc: A USGA 'rules of golf book' from 1934 putts into the shop. Then, Rick checks out an organ owned by Steven Tyler. Later, Chumlee takes a big swing at golf after he and Corey make a wager.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent Stars and Rebel Cars
programme.desc: Corey checks out a 1940 Buick said to have been owned by Fidel Castro. Will he jump at the chance to own a piece of the communist's sedan? Then, Rick is silenced when Charlie Chaplin's driver's licence cruises into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: No Pawn for You!
programme.desc: A chair belonging to Abraham Lincoln; a vintage Nintendo Donkey Kong arcade game; a signed Seinfeld script; a brigade of antique firefighting buckets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Seven Barreled Pawn
programme.desc: A Nock Valley gun used by the Royal Navy; an etching by Joan Miro; the first American pasta machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Money to Pawn
programme.desc: Don't get fooled at the pawn shop when a seller hands Chumlee a thirty dollar bill. Will this curious cash have Chum reaching for his wallet to buy it or will it turn out to be a costly currency that's not worth making a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Patent
programme.desc: An autograph of astronomer Edwin Hubble; an 1850s patent model self-lighting and extinguishing lantern; a Starrett Food Chopper; an 1871 British Martini-Henry Short Lever Rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fully Vested
programme.desc: A pretty pair of 18th century breechloading pistols mosey into the shop. A seller pops by with a paperweight by renowned glass artist, Paul Stankard. A custom, harmonica-holding vest that was made for Blues Traveler's front man, John Popper, stuns Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Payne in the Putt
programme.desc: By a stroke of luck, a pair of knickers that belonged to golfer Payne Stewart swing into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Game of Pawns
programme.desc: Winter is coming when Rick sees an autographed Game of Thrones item. Then, Chumlee stirs up commotion with an Amazonian blowgun, and picker Spencer Victory stops by with an ancient Middle Eastern sword. Later, Rick checks out a 1900s DNC collectible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: From Pawn, With Love
programme.desc: Rick Dale helps Corey and Chumlee out with restoring an antique games from the 1990s. Then, Rick checks out a never before seen map from the Battle of Gettysburg. Plus, vintage stuffed animals get Corey and Chum emotional.

programme.desc: Detectives respond to a cemetery caretaker's complaint of several grave robberies.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached
programme.desc: Detectives come up with a creative plan to catch two dangerous alligator poachers red-handed.

programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Vachagan
programme.desc: A man with everything going for him falls prey to drugs, leading him to crime.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: My Murder Story: The Search for Justice
programme.desc: In a secluded park located in Baltimore, Maryland, a disabled man is found shot to death in a public restroom. Now, his uncle, seeks clues to bring down the predators involved and faces opposition from a tight-lipped community.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Kay Wenal?
programme.desc: Erin Moriarty takes viewers deep inside the investigation into a hard-to-close murder case and those investigators are asking the audience to help solve the murder of Kay Wenal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Missing Marsha
programme.desc: A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months, her hairdresser pushes for answers.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered, her case goes unsolved for a year. A fortuitous arrest brings with it a new prime suspect, but an explosive confession of forbidden love causes everyone close to the case to reevaluate all they know.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Bound by Honor
programme.desc: Love and tradition collide when a young woman forbidden from dating falls for a handsome stranger. She knows she must keep her relationship hidden from her orthodox father and protective brother.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.desc: At the outset of WWII, the Germans pioneer a new form of mobile armoured warfare. This is the story of the famed Nazi Blitzkrieg, as thousands of panzers burst through terrain thought impassible to conquer Western Europe in a matter of weeks.

programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Containables: Stacking the Decks to a T
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen are eager to begin work on a very special container home that combines a unique design with the scenic beauty of South Texas. The home consists of three containers stacked to create a cantilevered look with multi-level decks.

programme.title: Containables: Containers of Staggering Size
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen raise the bar by taking on their biggest container home yet for a homeowner who wants a home where her entire family can bunk down and enjoy the amazing views her property affords.

programme.title: Containables: Deadlines and Due Dates
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design a three-container structure in the Smoky Mountains of North Carolina. Dealing with tricky terrain and inclement mountain weather, the team enlists their families' help to install bowling alley wood countertops, patio doors and more.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Overhaul
programme.desc: Jeff is challenged to bring out the history in an 1802 farmhouse that has had a number of questionable renovations throughout its 200 years. His clients want original stone and ceiling beams in the dining room and an overhaul of the fireplace.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Mudroom From Scratch
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked with turning a couple's wide-open front porch into an enclosed mudroom that blends the 1740s stone portion of their home with the 1800s wood siding portion. He also uncovers a gorgeous stone fireplace while restoring the living room.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe starts the day off right with breakfast on a stick, and gets to down to business with the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. McGlue's Feedbag
programme.desc: Jake comes into a windfall when Charlie takes him to the track, and Alan is stuck in that special hell known as the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Black-ish: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Gun

programme.title: Legacies: Facing Darkness Is Kinda My Thing
programme.desc: In a race to save Josie, Hope infiltrates her subconscious and finds herself in a fairy tale world filled with dark magic. At the Salvatore School, Alaric, Lizzie and the Super Squad commit a risky plan to get Josie back despite potential consequences.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Assistant
programme.desc: When Rachel is promoted, she considers hiring a handsome but inexperienced assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Serenity Now
programme.desc: Frank must say 'serenity now' whenever he feels his blood pressure rise. Kramer installs a screen door outside his apartment. George takes on his rival when his father hires them both to sell computers. Jerry's girlfriend comments on his lack of emotion.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Carl Gets a Roommate
programme.desc: Mike begins transforming the basement into a living area for him and Molly to live in, but the construction work is more than he can handle. Meanwhile, Carl invites Samuel to live with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Avoid the Chinese Mustard
programme.desc: Tired of the complications of a traditional relationship, Walden hires an actress to play the part of his girlfriend. Meanwhile, Jake and Missi plan a rendezvous at the beach house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Wingmom

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Barry Goldberg's Day Off
programme.desc: Inspired by the film "Ferris Bueller's Day Off," Barry fakes sick and attempts to create an epic day of his own. But his day off soon turns out to be a disaster. To salvage what's left of it, Pops and Adam join him but they make it worse.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And 2 Broke Girls: The Movie
programme.desc: As the big premiere of the film about Caroline's life arrives, the girls and the diner gang prepare for their night on the red carpet. Also, Caroline and Max contemplate their future at the diner and the states of their love lives.
